mapper.select: SELECT category_id AS categoryId, category_name AS categoryName, category_image_url AS categoryImageUrl FROM product_categories WHERE use_yn = 'Y' ORDER BY sort_order ASC, category_id ASC

SELECT product_id AS productId, category_id AS categoryId, product_name AS productName, product_image_url AS productImageUrl, price AS price, description AS description FROM products WHERE use_yn = 'Y' AND category_id = #{categoryId} ORDER BY product_id DESC

SELECT product_id AS productId, category_id AS categoryId, product_name AS productName, product_image_url AS productImageUrl, price AS price, description AS description FROM products WHERE use_yn = 'Y' AND product_id = #{productId}

SELECT product_id AS productId, category_id AS categoryId, product_name AS productName, product_image_url AS productImageUrl, price AS price, description AS description FROM products WHERE use_yn = 'Y' AND ( product_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR description LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') ) ORDER BY product_id DESC

SELECT product_id AS productId, category_id AS categoryId, product_name AS productName, product_image_url AS productImageUrl, price AS price, description AS description FROM products WHERE use_yn = 'Y' AND recommended_yn = 'Y' ORDER BY product_id DESC

SELECT product_id AS productId, category_id AS categoryId, product_name AS productName, product_image_url AS productImageUrl, price AS price, description AS description FROM products WHERE use_yn = 'Y' AND popular_yn = 'Y' ORDER BY product_id DESC
SELECT category_id AS categoryId, category_name AS categoryName, category_image_url AS categoryImageUrl FROM product_categories WHERE category_id = #{categoryId} AND use_yn = 'Y'
